ddls:
CREATE TABLE "resources" (
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the resource */,
  "type" INTEGER /* ID of the resource type */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author who uploaded the resource */,
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* ID of the subject the resource belongs to */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the resource was last updated */,
  "license" INTEGER /* ID of the license type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the resource */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for categorization */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the resource is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource was last updated */,
  "views_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been viewed */,
  "downloads_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the resource has been downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES resource_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_subject_id FOREIGN KEY ("subject_id") REFERENCES subjects ("subject_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resources_license FOREIGN KEY ("license") REFERENCES licenses ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the author is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "subjects" (
  "subject_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each subject */,
  "subject_name" TEXT /* Name of the subject */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the subject */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subject was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the subject's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the subject is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("subject_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the resource type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resource type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource type was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the resource type's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the resource type is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "licenses" (
  "license_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each license type */,
  "license_name" TEXT /* Name of the license type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the license type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the license's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the license is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("license_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the resource was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access event's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., student, instructor, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the user is active */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the version's information was last updated */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_versions_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving the rating */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was given */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating was given */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the rating's information was last updated */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or feedback provided with the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_ratings_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the department's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the department is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_departments" (
  "resource_department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource-department relationship */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* ID of the department */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resource_department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_departments_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES resources ("resource_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_departments_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role was added to the system */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the role's information was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag indicating if the role is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles_map" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the relationship's information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_map_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_map_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
